biological_replicate: we exploited an established Gfi1 knock-out mouse model.
technical_replicate: were seeded in triplicate at 1 million cells per ml.
experimental_design: Gfi1 KO thymocytes display higher levels of apoptosis, either at baseline or following exposure to IR, compared to WT controls.
factor_value: genotype (Gfi1 KO, GFI1 KI, Gfi1 KD)
Gfi1 KO, GFI1 KI, Gfi1 KD mice used in this study.
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described.
